description: Upper part of a twin list in the hand of Shelomo b. Eliyyahu, seemingly a draft, one list with amounts, and one mostly without amounts. The sums donated range from one-half dirham, given by the son of bell-maker, to five and one-half. The Rasuy gives one Nasiri through the judge Yehiel. (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, 488, App. C 44)
description_he: חלק עליון מרשימה כפולה בכתב שלמה בן אליהו, תרומות מחצי עד 5.5 דרהם
